# FOMC decision dates — NOT procedurally generated

`fomc_decision_dates.csv` holds the FOMC decision days (second day of each
scheduled meeting) currently baked into the pricer stack, 2026–2027.

**Provenance**: Fed-published schedule — these dates cannot be generated by
rule (the Fed sets ~8 meetings/year at irregular intervals). Two copies exist
in code and must stay in sync with this file:

- `Data Feeds\Bloomberg\sofr_curve_feed.py` → `FOMC_FALLBACK` (used when the
  daily scrape of federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm fails;
  the live scrape is served at `:8196/fomc`).
- `Vol Pricer\src\SofrTab.jsx` → `FOMC_RAW` (page-load seed; replaced by the
  `/fomc` pull on LOAD).

**Maintenance**: when the Fed publishes the next year's calendar (usually
~June), append here and update both code copies. The SOFR tab's meeting-date
bootstrap quality degrades silently if these run stale past the last listed
meeting.
